args.content:
Hawaii Packing List
====================
Emma Johnson's Vacation
June 10th - June 20th, 2024

Essential Items:
- Swimwear
- Sunscreen
- Hiking gear
- Casual outfits
- Camera
- Travel documents

Additional Recommendations Based on Activities:
- Beach day (June 11): Beach towel, flip-flops, sunglasses
- Snorkeling (June 12): Waterproof bag, rash guard
- Hiking at Diamond Head (June 13): Comfortable shoes, water bottle, hat
- Pearl Harbor (June 14): Comfortable walking shoes, light jacket
- North Shore road trip (June 15): Car rental confirmation, snacks
- Luau (June 16): Light evening outfit
- Spa day (June 17): Relaxation wear
- Kayaking (June 18): Water shoes, change of clothes
- Shopping (June 19): Reusable shopping bag
- Departure (June 20): All travel documents, passport, flight confirmation
